name: Classic Raised Bed S
description: Our entry-level raised bed crafted from sustainably sourced timber. Perfect for herbs, salads, and compact vegetables. The modular design means you can stack additional layers as your gardening ambitions grow. Each board is treated with a non-toxic preservative ensuring longevity in all weather conditions.
shortDescription: Compact raised bed for herbs & salads

name: Garden Raised Bed M
description: The medium raised bed is our most popular model. Spacious enough for a full salad patch or a row of tomatoes, yet compact enough to fit most patios and balconies. Constructed from FSC-certified timber with mortise-and-tenon joinery for structural integrity. Includes drainage boards.

name: Heritage Raised Bed L
description: Our large Heritage Raised Bed gives serious gardeners the space they need. With 180cm of growing length you can plant entire crop rows — carrots, beets, beans — without crowding. Double-walled construction holds warmth and moisture for extended growing seasons. Optional trellis attachment sold separately.
shortDescription: Long bed for serious vegetable growing

name: Estate Raised Bed XL
description: The Estate Raised Bed XL is our flagship planter — a statement piece for gardens and terraces alike. At 240cm wide and 80cm deep, it provides room for a complete kitchen garden. Heavy-duty corner posts and mid-span supports prevent any bowing. Ships in two boxes with full assembly instructions.
shortDescription: Flagship XL bed for full kitchen gardens

name: Wall Planter S
description: Transform blank walls into living art. The small wall planter mounts securely to any masonry or timber surface and is perfect for trailing herbs like thyme, oregano, and basil. Pre-drilled mounting holes and concealed liner included. Weighs under 3 kg when empty.

name: Wall Planter M
description: A generous mid-size wall planter suited for flowers, strawberries, or a curated herb collection. The integrated drip tray prevents wall staining, and the concealed reservoir keeps plants hydrated between waterings. Available in three finishes to complement any exterior.
shortDescription: Mid-size wall planter with drip tray

name: Wall Planter L
description: Our largest wall planter creates a stunning green wall feature. Three modular boxes stack or spread across your fence or exterior wall, connected by an integrated watering channel. Ideal for lavender hedges, colourful annuals, or a statement succulent display.
shortDescription: Large wall planter for feature green walls

name: Corner Unit M
description: Make the most of awkward corner spaces with our Corner Unit M. L-shaped design fills 90-degree corners perfectly, creating a cohesive look when paired with matching raised beds. Two independent planting zones with a shared structural corner post. Easy to assemble with push-fit joints.

name: Corner Unit L
description: The large Corner Unit creates a dramatic garden focal point. Extended arms at 120cm each wrap around corners with style. Three planting zones let you grow crops, flowers, and herbs in one cohesive structure. Optional seat board attachment turns it into a garden bench feature.
shortDescription: Large corner unit with three planting zones

name: Corner Unit XL
description: Our flagship Corner Unit XL is a complete garden installation. At 180cm per arm it wraps an entire corner seating area, creating a green enclosure that feels like a private garden room. Compatible with all Kubico accessories including the trellis system for vertical growing.
shortDescription: Full enclosure corner unit for garden rooms

name: Modular Trellis
description: Extend your raised bed vertically with the Kubico Modular Trellis. Constructed from the same sustainably sourced timber as our beds, it clips onto any Kubico frame without tools. Perfect for climbing beans, peas, cucumbers, and roses. Available in two widths to match S/M or L/XL beds.
shortDescription: Vertical climbing frame for any Kubico bed

name: Drip Irrigation Kit
description: Keep your plants perfectly watered without daily effort. The Kubico Drip Irrigation Kit includes a battery-powered timer, 8 adjustable drip nozzles, and 5m of micro-tubing sized for any Kubico bed. Set-and-forget watering keeps soil at optimal moisture during holidays or busy weeks.
shortDescription: Automated drip watering for any Kubico bed

name: Caster Wheel Set
description: Add mobility to any Kubico raised bed with our heavy-duty caster wheel set. Four lockable wheels rated to 80 kg total load attach to the base of any Kubico frame in minutes. Roll your planters to follow the sun or shelter them from frost — no lifting required.

name: Biodegradable Liner
description: Protect your timber and your soil with Kubico's biodegradable fleece liner. Made from 100% recycled PET fibres, it prevents soil leaching, retains moisture, and extends the life of your raised bed by up to 3 years. Cuts easily to any shape and comes in a roll to fit all bed sizes.
shortDescription: Eco fleece liner for longer-lasting beds
